_comment: Reference only — merge these devDependencies and scripts into your project's package.json. Do not run npm/pnpm install directly on this file.
notes: Script key is named 'my-ui' to match the existing figma-to-code skill's Phase 3 calls (pnpm my-ui info / figma / search / docs).
The underlying file is component-lookup.ts — only the package.json script alias is 'my-ui', not the filename.
react-docgen-typescript parses TSX component props into component-registry.json.
tsx runs the TypeScript registry generator and lookup CLI without a build step.
Regenerate registry (pnpm my-ui:gen) after component prop, export, file path, or Figma mapping changes.
